name: CrmAccount
label: CRM Account
description: CRM (Salesforce) account dimension. Central entity linking all ticket metrics, agent data, and Gong/UserVoice events. Key attributes: account name, region, market segment, success owner.

name: Date
label: Calendar Month
description: Calendar date dimension at monthly grain (MONTH_YEAR). Supports time-based filtering, YoY/MoM comparisons, and quarterly aggregations.

name: InstanceAccount
label: Zendesk Instance
description: Zendesk instance account dimension. Represents a customer's Zendesk deployment identified by subdomain. Links to CRM account via CRM_ACCOUNT_ID. One CRM account may have multiple instances.

name: AggInstanceAgentSummaryMonthly
label: Agent Summary (Monthly)
description: Monthly aggregated agent staffing metrics per Zendesk instance. Includes total active agents, remaining seats, closed tickets, productivity-eligible agents, and role breakdowns (admin/light/regular).

name: AggInstanceChannelTicketMonthly
label: Channel Tickets (Monthly)
description: Monthly ticket volume metrics by channel group per instance. Additive metrics: created tickets, closed tickets, CSAT counts (good/offered/responded). Supports cross-instance aggregation.

name: AggInstanceGuideMetricMonthly
label: Guide Metrics (Monthly)
description: Monthly Guide (knowledge base) engagement metrics per instance. Includes KB article views, community post views, published articles, new articles created, comments, and Q&A activity.

name: AggInstanceRbaChannelMetricMonthly
label: RBA Channel Metrics (Monthly)
description: Monthly RBA (Rules-Based Analysis) ticket metrics broken out by channel. Non-additive metrics (FRT, TTC, ratios) that must NOT be aggregated across instances. Channel dimension: RBA_CHANNEL_GROUP.

name: AggInstanceRbaMetricMonthly
label: RBA Metrics (Monthly)
description: Monthly RBA ticket metrics at instance level (no channel breakdown). Non-additive metrics: median FRT/TTC in hours, CSAT score, touch ratios, reopened ratio. Must be filtered to single instance.

name: ReferenceAccountLookup
label: Account Lookup
description: Simple account ID-to-name lookup reference. Used for Gong and UserVoice event enrichment.

name: TransformGongAccountMap
label: Gong-Account Map
description: Maps Gong conversations to CRM accounts with enriched account attributes (industry, region, segment, health, ARR).

name: TransformGongOpportunitieMap
label: Gong-Opportunity Map
description: Maps Gong conversations to CRM opportunities with opportunity details (type, status, stage, close date, products).

name: TransformGongTrackerTaxonomy
label: Gong Tracker Taxonomy
description: Hierarchical taxonomy of Gong conversation trackers (up to 4 category levels). Used for topic classification of sales calls.

name: UnifiedGongEvent
label: Gong Call Event
description: Unified Gong call events with spotlight summaries, key points, next steps, and curated transcripts. Primary key: CONVERSATION_KEY.

name: UnifiedUservoiceEvent
label: UserVoice Feedback
description: Unified UserVoice product feedback events combining suggestions and requests. Enriched with CRM account data.

name: EdaMlContactActivityDailySnapshot
label: Contact Activity Snapshot
description: Daily snapshot of Salesforce contact activities (events/tasks). Snapshotted with SOURCE_SNAPSHOT_DATE. Use _BCV view for latest.

name: EdaMlContactDailySnapshot
label: Contact Snapshot
description: Daily snapshot of CRM contacts with engagement scores, web activity, and role information. Use _BCV view for latest snapshot.

name: EdaMlCrmAccountDailySnapshot
label: CRM Account Snapshot (Full)
description: Comprehensive daily CRM account snapshot with 100+ attributes including ARR, health, renewal, territory, engagement metrics. Superset of DIM_CRM_ACCOUNT. Use _BCV for latest.

name: EdaMlInstanceAccountDailySnapshot
label: Instance Account Snapshot (Full)
description: Comprehensive daily Zendesk instance snapshot with 160+ attributes including seat utilization, ticket volumes, CSAT, AR usage, product mix, feature adoption. Use _BCV for latest.

name: EdaMlInstanceChannelMonthlySnapshot
label: Instance Channel Snapshot
description: Monthly channel-level ticket metrics from EDA_ML pipeline. Similar to CONVERGE RBA channel metrics but includes MoM percent changes. Snapshotted.

name: EdaMlInstanceProductDailySnapshot
label: Product Subscription Snapshot
description: Daily product subscription snapshot per instance. Includes product offering, plan, billing, seats, ARR. Use _BCV for latest.

name: EdaMlOpportunitieDailySnapshot
label: Opportunity Snapshot
description: Daily CRM opportunity snapshot with pipeline details, stage, status, booking ARR by product line. Use _BCV for latest.

name: EdaMlUserDailySnapshot
label: User (AE) Snapshot
description: Daily CRM user (account executive) snapshot with role, region, segment. Use _BCV for latest. Joins to accounts via EdaMlUserAccountMapping.

name: EdaMlUserAccountMapping
label: User-Account Mapping
description: Maps CRM users (AEs, CSMs) to CRM accounts with role designation. Critical for user-context filtering in benchmark queries. Use _BCV for latest.
